name: Juice Shop — unsalted MD5 used for password hashing

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: Weird Crypto.

notes: The shared hash() helper uses unsalted MD5, a broken fast hash, to derive password hashes — trivially reversible via rainbow tables. Fix uses bcrypt.hashSync with a cost factor.
